name: footer
description: A multi-column site footer: a brand block with a blurb and optional social links, a set of labelled link columns, and a bottom bar with a copyright line and optional legal links. Renders a footer (contentinfo) landmark; the brand stacks above the columns on mobile and sits beside them from md up.

notes: Renders a footer (contentinfo) landmark, and each link column is a nav labelled by its title so screen-reader users can jump between groups
Icon-only social links carry an accessible name via aria-label, and their glyphs are decorative (aria-hidden)
The bottom-bar legal links sit in their own labelled nav
Built on the ibirdui separator primitive for the bottom-bar rule

intents: a site footer with link columns and a bottom bar
a multi-column marketing footer with social links
a contentinfo footer built on ibirdui
examples: <Footer brand={<Logo />} columns={[{ title: 'Product', links: [{ label: 'Catalogue', href: '/' }] }]} copyright="© 2025 ibirdui" />
